0.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Ayyub al-Ansari (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to use the tooth-stick (siwak) two or three times at night. When he stood for the night prayer, he would pray four rak'ahs, not speaking and not commanding anything, giving the salam after every two rak'ahs. And also that when the Messenger of Allah ﷺ performed wudu, he would rinse his mouth and wipe his beard from beneath with water.
0.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Ayyub al-Ansari (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ biasa bersiwak dua atau tiga kali di malam hari. Apabila beliau bangkit untuk shalat malam, beliau shalat empat rakaat tanpa berbicara dan tanpa memerintahkan sesuatu pun, memberi salam setelah setiap dua rakaat. Dan juga bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ apabila berwudhu, beliau berkumur dan mengusap jenggotnya dari bawahnya dengan air.

1.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Ayyub al-Ansari (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'One of you asks about news of the heavens while leaving his nails like the claws of birds, in which impurity, filth, and dirt accumulate.'
1.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Ayyub al-Ansari (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Salah seorang dari kalian bertanya tentang berita langit sementara ia membiarkan kukunya seperti cakar burung yang di dalamnya terkumpul janabat, kotoran, dan daki.'

2.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Ayyub al-Ansari (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ said: 'Verily Aslam, Ghifar, Muzaynah, Ashja', Juhaynah, and those from Banu Ka'b are my allies above all others, and Allah and His Messenger are their patrons.'
2.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Ayyub al-Ansari (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Sesungguhnya Aslam, Ghifar, Muzainah, Asyja', Juhainah, dan mereka yang termasuk Bani Ka'b adalah mawali (sekutu)-ku di atas manusia lainnya, dan Allah serta Rasul-Nya adalah pelindung mereka.'

3.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Ayyub al-Ansari (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ recited Surah al-A'raf in the Maghrib prayer, spreading it over both rak'ahs.
3.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Ayyub al-Ansari (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ membaca surah Al-A'raf dalam shalat Maghrib, dibagi dalam kedua rakaatnya.

4.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Ayyub al-Ansari (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Pray Witr with five (rak'ahs); if you cannot, then with three; if you cannot, then with one; and if you cannot, then make a gesture of prayer.'
4.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Ayyub al-Ansari (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Shalatlah witir lima rakaat; jika tidak mampu maka tiga; jika tidak mampu maka satu; dan jika tidak mampu maka cukup dengan isyarat shalat.'

5.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Ayyub al-Ansari (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Whoever says "There is no god but Allah, alone, with no partner; His is the dominion and to Him belongs all praise, and He has power over all things" ten times, it will be equivalent to freeing ten slaves, or a slave.'
5.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Ayyub al-Ansari (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Barangsiapa mengucapkan "Laa ilaaha illallaah wahdahu laa syariika lahu, lahul mulku wa lahul hamdu wa huwa 'alaa kulli syai'in qadiir" sepuluh kali, maka itu setara dengan memerdekakan sepuluh budak, atau satu budak.'

6.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Ayyub al-Ansari (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ said: 'Surah Qul Huwa Allahu Ahad (al-Ikhlas) is equivalent to one-third of the Quran.'
6.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Ayyub al-Ansari (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Surah Qul Huwallahu Ahad (Al-Ikhlas) setara dengan sepertiga Al-Quran.'

7.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Ayyub al-Ansari (may Allah be pleased with him) that al-Miswar ibn Makhramah and Ibn Abbas disagreed about whether a person in ihram may wash his head. Ibn Abbas said he may wash it, and al-Miswar said he may not. They sent me to Abu Ayyub, and he poured water over his head, passing his hands forward and backward over it, then said: 'This is how I saw the Prophet ﷺ do it.'
7.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Ayyub al-Ansari (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Al-Miswar ibn Makhramah dan Ibnu Abbas berselisih tentang apakah orang yang berihram boleh mencuci kepalanya. Ibnu Abbas berkata boleh mencuci, dan al-Miswar berkata tidak boleh. Mereka mengutus aku kepada Abu Ayyub, lalu ia menuangkan air ke kepalanya dan menggerakkan kedua tangannya ke depan dan ke belakang, kemudian berkata: 'Beginilah aku melihat Nabi ﷺ melakukannya.'

8.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Ayyub al-Ansari (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ combined the Maghrib and Isha prayers at Muzdalifah.
8.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Ayyub al-Ansari (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ menggabungkan shalat Maghrib dan Isya di Muzdalifah.

9.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Ayyub al-Ansari (may Allah be pleased with him) that a man asked: 'O Messenger of Allah, tell me of a deed that will admit me to Paradise.' The people said: 'What is the matter with him?' The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'He has a need.' Then he ﷺ said: 'Worship Allah and do not associate anything with Him, establish the prayer, pay the zakat, and maintain ties of kinship.'
9.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Ayyub al-Ansari (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Seorang laki-laki bertanya: 'Wahai Rasulullah, beritahukan kepadaku suatu amalan yang akan memasukkanku ke surga.' Orang-orang berkata: 'Ada apa dengannya?' Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Ia punya keperluan.' Kemudian beliau bersabda: 'Sembahlah Allah dan jangan menyekutukan-Nya dengan sesuatu pun, tegakkan shalat, tunaikan zakat, dan sambunglah silaturahmi.'

10.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Ayyub al-Ansari (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ gave guidance and instruction.
10.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Ayyub al-Ansari (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ memberikan bimbingan dan petunjuk.

50.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Ayyub al-Ansari (may Allah be pleased with him) that Abu Ayyub participated in the expedition with Yazid ibn Muawiyah, and said: 'When I die, take me into enemy territory and bury me beneath your feet where you meet the enemy.' He died and was buried beneath the walls of Constantinople.
50.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Ayyub al-Ansari (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Abu Ayyub mengikuti ekspedisi bersama Yazid ibn Muawiyah, dan berkata: 'Apabila aku meninggal, bawalah aku ke wilayah musuh dan kuburkanlah aku di bawah kaki kalian di tempat kalian bertemu musuh.' Ia meninggal dan dikuburkan di bawah tembok Konstantinopel.

95.iwh_en: It was narrated from Nawfal ibn Muawiyah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ said: 'Whoever misses the prayer is as though he has lost his family and wealth.'
95.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Nawfal ibn Muawiyah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Barangsiapa yang terlewat shalatnya, maka seolah-olah ia kehilangan keluarga dan hartanya.'

96.iwh_en: It was narrated that the Prophet ﷺ was asked about the aqiqah. He said: 'I do not like disobedience (uquq), but whoever has a child born to him and wishes to sacrifice on the child's behalf, let him do so.'
96.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan bahwa Nabi ﷺ ditanya tentang aqiqah. Beliau bersabda: 'Aku tidak menyukai kedurhakaan (uquq), namun barangsiapa dikaruniai anak dan ingin menyembelih atas namanya, maka lakukanlah.'

98.iwh_en: It was narrated that a man brought silver to the Prophet ﷺ saying: 'This is from a mine of ours.' The Prophet ﷺ said: 'There will be mines, and the best mine is that from which you give the right of Allah that is in it.'
98.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan bahwa Seorang laki-laki membawa perak kepada Nabi ﷺ seraya berkata: 'Ini dari tambang milik kami.' Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Akan ada tambang-tambang, dan sebaik-baik tambang adalah yang darinya engkau menunaikan hak Allah yang ada di dalamnya.'

99.iwh_en: It was narrated that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ forbade facing either of the two qiblahs when urinating or defecating.
99.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ melarang menghadap salah satu dari dua kiblat saat buang air kecil atau besar.

100.iwh_en: It was narrated that a man stabbed a she-camel in the throat with a tent-peg, fearing it would escape him. He asked the Prophet ﷺ, and the Prophet ﷺ commanded him — or them — to eat it.
100.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan bahwa seorang laki-laki menusuk unta betina di lehernya dengan pasak tenda, karena khawatir unta itu akan lepas. Ia bertanya kepada Nabi ﷺ, dan Nabi ﷺ memerintahkannya — atau mereka — untuk memakannya.

101.iwh_en: It was narrated that the Prophet ﷺ said: 'A man should not beg while he possesses an uqiyyah (forty dirhams) or its equivalent, for if he does he is begging importunately.'
101.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Seorang laki-laki tidak boleh meminta-minta sementara ia memiliki satu uqiyyah (empat puluh dirham) atau setaranya, karena jika ia melakukannya maka ia meminta secara berlebihan.'

102.iwh_en: It was narrated that the Prophet ﷺ was seen at al-'Arj pouring water over his head due to the heat — or a headache — while he was in the state of ihram.
102.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan bahwa Nabi ﷺ terlihat di al-'Arj sedang menuangkan air ke kepalanya karena kepanasan — atau sakit kepala — sementara beliau dalam keadaan ihram.

109.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abdullah ibn Tha'labah ibn Su'ayr (may Allah be pleased with him) that when the Messenger of Allah ﷺ overlooked the martyrs of Uhud, he said: 'I bear witness for these. Shroud them with their wounds and their blood, for every wound inflicted in the way of Allah will come on the Day of Resurrection with the color of blood and the scent of musk.'
109.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abdullah ibn Tha'labah ibn Su'ayr (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ketika Rasulullah ﷺ melihat para syuhada Uhud, beliau bersabda: 'Aku bersaksi atas mereka. Kafanilah mereka bersama luka-luka dan darah mereka, karena setiap luka yang ditimpakan di jalan Allah akan datang pada Hari Kiamat dengan warna darah dan aroma misk.'

113.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abdullah ibn Tha'labah ibn Su'ayr (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ addressed the people two days before Eid al-Fitr and said: 'Give a sa' of wheat or grain (as Zakat al-Fitr), between every two persons — or one sa' per person.'

120.iwh_en: It was narrated that an Ansari man came to the Messenger of Allah ﷺ and whispered to him, seeking permission to kill a hypocrite. The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said openly: 'Does he not testify that there is no god but Allah?' He said: 'Yes, but his testimony is false.' He said: 'Does he not pray?' He said: 'Yes, but his prayer is false.' He ﷺ said: 'I have been forbidden from killing those who pray.'
120.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan bahwa Seorang laki-laki Anshar datang kepada Rasulullah ﷺ dan berbisik kepadanya, meminta izin untuk membunuh seorang munafik. Rasulullah ﷺ berbicara keras: 'Apakah ia tidak bersaksi bahwa tidak ada tuhan selain Allah?' Ia berkata: 'Ya, tetapi kesaksiannya palsu.' Beliau bersabda: 'Apakah ia tidak shalat?' Ia berkata: 'Ya, tetapi shalatnya palsu.' Beliau bersabda: 'Aku dilarang dari membunuh orang-orang yang shalat.'

149.iwh_en: It was narrated from Amr ibn al-Hamiq (may Allah be pleased with him) that Rifa'ah al-Qitbani said: 'I entered upon al-Mukhtar, and he threw a cushion down for me and said: "Were it not that my brother Jibril just rose from this spot, I would have thrown it for you." I intended to strike his neck, but I recalled a hadith that my brother Amr ibn al-Hamiq narrated to me — that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: "Whoever grants safe conduct to a man and then kills him, I am free of the killer, even if the killed man was a disbeliever."'
149.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Amr ibn al-Hamiq (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rifa'ah al-Qitbani berkata: 'Aku masuk kepada al-Mukhtar, dan ia melemparkan bantal untukku dan berkata: "Seandainya bukan karena saudaraku Jibril baru saja bangkit dari tempat ini, tentu aku melemparkannya untukmu." Aku bermaksud menebas lehernya, namun aku teringat hadits yang diceritakan kepadaku oleh saudaraku Amr ibn al-Hamiq — bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: "Barangsiapa memberikan jaminan keamanan kepada seseorang kemudian membunuhnya, maka aku berlepas diri dari si pembunuh, meskipun yang dibunuh adalah seorang kafir."'

150.iwh_en: It was narrated from Amr ibn al-Hamiq (may Allah be pleased with him) that Rifa'ah al-Qitbani said: 'I entered upon al-Mukhtar, and he threw a cushion down for me and said: "Were it not that my brother Jibril just rose from this spot, I would have thrown it for you." I intended to strike his neck, but I recalled a hadith that my brother Amr ibn al-Hamiq narrated to me — that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: "Whoever grants safe conduct to a man and then kills him, I am free of the killer, even if the killed man was a disbeliever."'

Aku bermaksud menebas lehernya, namun aku teringat hadits yang diceritakan kepadaku oleh saudaraku Amr ibn al-Hamiq — bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: "Barangsiapa memberikan jaminan keamanan kepada seseorang kemudian membunuhnya, maka aku berlepas diri dari si pembunuh, meskipun yang dibunuh adalah seorang kafir."'

180.iwh_en: It was narrated from Salman al-Farisi (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ said: 'One day and night of ribat (guarding the frontier for Allah's sake) is better than fasting a month and standing in prayer. If one dies while on ribat, his good deeds continue to be recorded, and he is protected from the trial of the grave.'
180.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Salman al-Farisi (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Ribath satu hari satu malam (berjaga di perbatasan demi Allah) lebih baik dari puasa satu bulan dan qiyam lailnya. Jika ia meninggal saat ribath, amal shalihnya terus mengalir, dan ia dilindungi dari fitnah kubur.'

191.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn 'Atik (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'There is jealousy that Allah loves and jealousy that Allah hates. The jealousy that Allah loves is jealousy in a matter of genuine doubt. The jealousy that Allah hates is jealousy in a matter free of doubt. And there is pride that Allah loves and pride that Allah hates — the pride that Allah loves is a man's pride in fighting Allah's enemies, and the pride that Allah hates is pride in falsehood.'
191.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn 'Atik (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Ada kecemburuan yang Allah cintai dan kecemburuan yang Allah benci. Kecemburuan yang Allah cintai adalah kecemburuan dalam perkara yang benar-benar meragukan. Kecemburuan yang Allah benci adalah kecemburuan dalam perkara yang tidak meragukan. Dan ada kebanggaan yang Allah cintai dan kebanggaan yang Allah benci — kebanggaan yang Allah cintai adalah kebanggaan seseorang dalam memerangi musuh Allah, dan kebanggaan yang Allah benci adalah kebanggaan dalam kebatilan.'

196.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn 'Atik (may Allah be pleased with him) that when Abdullah ibn Thabit was near death, his daughter said: 'By Allah, O father, I had hoped you would be a martyr, for you had prepared all your equipment.' He said: 'Allah knows that I was sincere.' Then Jabir ibn 'Atik narrated that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Being killed in the way of Allah is martyrdom, and dying of plague is martyrdom, and dying in childbirth is martyrdom...'
196.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn 'Atik (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ketika Abdullah ibn Tsabit sekarat, putrinya berkata: 'Demi Allah, wahai Ayah, aku berharap engkau menjadi syahid, karena engkau telah mempersiapkan semua perlengkapanmu.' Ia berkata: 'Allah mengetahui bahwa aku ikhlas.' Kemudian Jabir ibn 'Atik meriwayatkan bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Terbunuh di jalan Allah adalah syahid, meninggal karena wabah adalah syahid, dan meninggal dalam persalinan adalah syahid...'

197.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ memberikan bimbingan kepada para sahabatnya.

198.iwh_en: It was narrated that a man's parents disputed over him before the Prophet ﷺ, one of them Muslim and the other a disbeliever. The Prophet ﷺ placed the child between them and said: 'O Allah, guide him.' The child moved toward the Muslim parent.
198.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan bahwa Orang tua seorang anak bersengketa tentangnya di hadapan Nabi ﷺ, salah satunya Muslim dan yang lain kafir. Nabi ﷺ menempatkan anak di antara mereka dan berdoa: 'Ya Allah, tunjukilah dia.' Anak itu bergerak menuju orang tua yang Muslim.

199.iwh_en: It was narrated that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ gave guidance to his companions.
199.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ memberikan bimbingan kepada para sahabatnya.

200.iwh_en: It was narrated from Rafi' ibn Sinan (may Allah be pleased with him) that Rafi' ibn Sinan embraced Islam but his wife refused. She came to the Prophet ﷺ and said: 'My daughter, and she is a weaned infant.' Rafi' said: 'My daughter.' The Prophet ﷺ seated the daughter on one side and the mother on another, and the daughter moved toward her father.
200.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Rafi' ibn Sinan (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rafi' ibn Sinan masuk Islam namun istrinya menolak. Istrinya datang kepada Nabi ﷺ dan berkata: 'Putriku, ia masih bayi yang baru disapih.' Rafi' berkata: 'Putriku.' Nabi ﷺ mendudukkan putrinya di satu sisi dan ibunya di sisi lain, lalu putrinya bergerak menuju ayahnya.

201.iwh_en: It was narrated that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ forbade the pecking of the crow (doing the prostration so quickly that one does not settle), the spreading out of the predator (lying on one's arms during prostration), and a man establishing a fixed spot for prayer as a camel establishes its lying-down spot.
201.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ melarang mematuk seperti gagak (sujud sangat cepat tanpa tuma'ninah), membentangkan diri seperti binatang buas (menelungkupkan lengan saat sujud), dan seorang laki-laki menetapkan tempat shalatnya seperti unta menetapkan tempat berbaringnya.

202.iwh_en: It was narrated that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ gave guidance to his companions.
202.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ memberikan bimbingan kepada para sahabatnya.

205.iwh_en: It was narrated from Mu'awiyah ibn al-Hakam al-Sulami (may Allah be pleased with him) that Mu'awiyah ibn al-Hakam al-Sulami said: 'While I was praying with the Messenger of Allah ﷺ, a man sneezed and I said: "May Allah have mercy on you." The people stared at me. When they kept silent, I remained quiet. After the prayer, the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: "Talking is not appropriate during prayer — it consists of glorification (tasbih), takbir, and recitation of the Quran."'
205.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Mu'awiyah ibn al-Hakam al-Sulami (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Mu'awiyah ibn al-Hakam al-Sulami berkata: 'Sementara aku shalat bersama Rasulullah ﷺ, seorang laki-laki bersin lalu aku mengucapkan: "Yarhamukallah." Orang-orang menatapku. Ketika mereka diam, aku pun diam. Setelah shalat, Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: "Tidak pantas ada pembicaraan dalam shalat — shalat itu terdiri dari tasbih, takbir, dan bacaan Al-Quran."'

206.iwh_en: It was narrated that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ gave guidance to his companions.
206.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ memberikan bimbingan kepada para sahabatnya.

207.iwh_en: It was narrated from Mu'awiyah ibn al-Hakam al-Sulami (may Allah be pleased with him) that Mu'awiyah ibn al-Hakam al-Sulami said: 'I said: "O Messenger of Allah, some things we used to do in the pre-Islamic period — we used to consult soothsayers." The Prophet ﷺ said: "Do not go to soothsayers." I said: "And we used to take omens." He said: "That is something you find in yourselves, so do not let it prevent you from acting."'
207.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Mu'awiyah ibn al-Hakam al-Sulami (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Mu'awiyah ibn al-Hakam al-Sulami berkata: 'Aku berkata: "Wahai Rasulullah, ada hal-hal yang kami lakukan di masa jahiliyah — kami biasa mendatangi para dukun." Nabi ﷺ bersabda: "Jangan mendatangi para dukun." Aku berkata: "Dan kami biasa mengambil pertanda buruk." Beliau bersabda: "Itu adalah sesuatu yang kalian temukan dalam diri kalian, maka jangan biarkan itu menghalangi kalian dari bertindak."'

Setelah shalat, Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: "Tidak pantas ada pembicaraan dalam shalat — shalat itu terdiri dari tasbih, takbir, dan bacaan Al-Quran."'

212.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ memberikan bimbingan kepada para sahabatnya.

214.iwh_en: It was narrated from Mu'awiyah ibn al-Hakam al-Sulami (may Allah be pleased with him) that Mu'awiyah ibn al-Hakam al-Sulami said: 'I said: "O Messenger of Allah, some things we used to do in the pre-Islamic period — we used to consult soothsayers." The Prophet ﷺ said: "Do not go to soothsayers." I said: "And we used to take omens." He said: "That is something you find in yourselves, so do not let it prevent you from acting."'
214.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Mu'awiyah ibn al-Hakam al-Sulami (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Mu'awiyah ibn al-Hakam al-Sulami berkata: 'Aku berkata: "Wahai Rasulullah, ada hal-hal yang kami lakukan di masa jahiliyah — kami biasa mendatangi para dukun." Nabi ﷺ bersabda: "Jangan mendatangi para dukun." Aku berkata: "Dan kami biasa mengambil pertanda buruk." Beliau bersabda: "Itu adalah sesuatu yang kalian temukan dalam diri kalian, maka jangan biarkan itu menghalangi kalian dari bertindak."'

216.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Ayyub al-Ansari (may Allah be pleased with him) that 'Utban ibn Malik said: 'My eyesight weakened and floods used to come between me and my mosque. I wished that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ would come and pray in my house so that I could use that spot as a place of prayer.' The Messenger of Allah ﷺ came and prayed in his house at a place of his choosing.
216.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Ayyub al-Ansari (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa 'Utban ibn Malik berkata: 'Penglihatanku melemah dan banjir sering memisahkan aku dengan masjidku. Aku berharap Rasulullah ﷺ mau datang dan shalat di rumahku agar aku bisa menjadikan tempat itu sebagai mushalla.' Rasulullah ﷺ datang dan shalat di rumahnya di tempat yang beliau pilih.

The Messenger of Allah ﷺ came and prayed in his house at a place of his choosing.

218.iwh_en: It was narrated from 'Utban ibn Malik (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ prayed the Duha (mid-morning) prayer in the house of 'Utban ibn Malik, and the people stood behind him and prayed with his prayer.
218.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari 'Utban ibn Malik (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ shalat Dhuha di rumah 'Utban ibn Malik, dan orang-orang berdiri di belakang beliau dan shalat mengikuti shalatnya.

219.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu al-Badah ibn 'Asim (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ gave a concession to the shepherds that they might spend the nights away from Mina, pelting the jamarat on the day of sacrifice, then on the following day or the day after, combining two days' pelting into one day.
219.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu al-Badah ibn 'Asim (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ memberikan keringanan kepada para penggembala untuk tidak bermalam di Mina, melempar jamarat pada hari kurban, kemudian pada hari berikutnya atau hari setelahnya, menggabungkan lemparan dua hari dalam satu hari.

224.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abdullah ibn Salam (may Allah be pleased with him) that Abdullah ibn Salam said: 'I said while the Messenger of Allah ﷺ was sitting: "We find in the Book of Allah that on Friday there is an hour in which no Muslim servant meets Allah in prayer except that Allah grants him his request."' The Messenger of Allah ﷺ indicated that it is the hour.
224.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abdullah ibn Salam (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Abdullah ibn Salam berkata: 'Aku berkata sementara Rasulullah ﷺ duduk: "Kami mendapati dalam Kitab Allah bahwa pada hari Jumat terdapat satu saat di mana tidak ada seorang hamba Muslim yang berjumpa dengan Allah dalam shalat kecuali Allah mengabulkan permintaannya."' Rasulullah ﷺ mengisyaratkan bahwa itulah saatnya.

225.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abdullah ibn Salam (may Allah be pleased with him) that Abdullah ibn Salam said: 'What is between Kada' and Uhud is sacred — the Messenger of Allah ﷺ declared it sacred. I would never cut a tree from it.'
225.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abdullah ibn Salam (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Abdullah ibn Salam berkata: 'Apa yang ada antara Kada' dan Uhud adalah wilayah haram — Rasulullah ﷺ menjadikannya haram. Aku tidak akan pernah menebang pohon darinya.'

226.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abdullah ibn Salam (may Allah be pleased with him) that Abdullah ibn Salam said: 'I said while the Messenger of Allah ﷺ was sitting: "We find in the Book of Allah that on Friday there is an hour in which no Muslim servant meets Allah in prayer except that Allah grants him his request."' The Messenger of Allah ﷺ indicated that it is the hour.

227.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abdullah ibn Salam (may Allah be pleased with him) that Abdullah ibn Salam said: 'I came to the Messenger of Allah ﷺ when my name was not yet Abdullah. The Prophet ﷺ named me Abdullah.'
227.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abdullah ibn Salam (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Abdullah ibn Salam berkata: 'Aku datang kepada Rasulullah ﷺ ketika namaku belum Abdullah. Nabi ﷺ menamaku Abdullah.'

228.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abdullah ibn Salam (may Allah be pleased with him) that Abdullah ibn Salam narrated a hadith while walking with the Messenger of Allah ﷺ.
228.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abdullah ibn Salam (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Abdullah ibn Salam meriwayatkan suatu hadits saat berjalan bersama Rasulullah ﷺ.

229.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abdullah ibn Salam (may Allah be pleased with him) that Abdullah ibn Salam said: 'When the Prophet ﷺ arrived in Madinah, the people rushed to see him. I was among those who went. When I looked at his face, I knew it was not the face of a liar. The first thing he said was: "O people, spread the greeting of peace, feed food, maintain kinship ties, and pray at night while people sleep — you will enter Paradise in peace."'
229.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abdullah ibn Salam (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Abdullah ibn Salam berkata: 'Ketika Nabi ﷺ tiba di Madinah, orang-orang bergegas menemuinya. Aku termasuk yang pergi. Ketika aku melihat wajahnya, aku tahu itu bukan wajah seorang pendusta. Hal pertama yang beliau sampaikan adalah: "Wahai manusia, sebarkanlah salam, berikanlah makanan, sambunglah silaturahmi, dan shalatlah di malam hari sementara manusia tidur — kalian akan masuk surga dalam keadaan damai."'

240.iwh_en: It was narrated that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'There is no prophethood after me except al-mubashshirat (the glad tidings).' It was asked: 'What are al-mubashshirat?' He ﷺ said: 'The good vision — the righteous dream.'
240.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Tidak ada kenabian setelahku kecuali al-mubasysyirat (kabar gembira).' Ditanyakan: 'Apa itu al-mubasysyirat?' Beliau bersabda: 'Visi yang baik — mimpi yang shalih.'

270.iwh_en: It was narrated from al-Miqdad ibn al-Aswad (may Allah be pleased with him) that al-Miqdad ibn al-Aswad took a handful of earth and threw it in the faces of those who were praising (excessively), saying: 'The Prophet of Allah ﷺ said: "When you hear those who praise excessively, throw dust in their faces."'
270.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari al-Miqdad ibn al-Aswad (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Al-Miqdad ibn al-Aswad mengambil segenggam tanah lalu melemparkannya ke wajah orang-orang yang memuji secara berlebihan, seraya berkata: 'Nabi Allah ﷺ bersabda: "Apabila kalian mendengar orang-orang yang berlebihan dalam memuji, lemparkan tanah ke wajah mereka."'

285.iwh_en: It was narrated from Qays ibn Sa'd (may Allah be pleased with him) that Qays ibn Sa'd said: 'The Prophet ﷺ came to us and we prepared a bath for him. He bathed, then we brought him a soft garment and he wrapped himself in it. It was as if I am looking at the traces of henna on the limbs of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ.'
285.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Qays ibn Sa'd (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Qays ibn Sa'd berkata: 'Nabi ﷺ datang kepada kami dan kami menyiapkan air mandi untuknya. Beliau mandi, kemudian kami membawakan untuknya kain yang lembut dan beliau memakainya. Seolah-olah aku melihat bekas henna di anggota tubuh Rasulullah ﷺ.'

295.iwh_en: It was narrated from al-Miqdad ibn al-Aswad (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said to his companions: 'What do you say about fornication?' They said: 'It is forbidden — Allah and His Messenger have forbidden it.' He said: 'A man fornicating with ten women is lighter than a man fornicating with the wife of his neighbor.'
295.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari al-Miqdad ibn al-Aswad (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ berkata kepada para sahabatnya: 'Apa pendapat kalian tentang zina?' Mereka berkata: 'Haram — Allah dan Rasul-Nya telah mengharamkannya.' Beliau bersabda: 'Seorang laki-laki yang berzina dengan sepuluh wanita lebih ringan daripada seorang laki-laki yang berzina dengan istri tetangganya.'
